format.raw: itime=$EPOCH date=$DATE time=$TIME logid=0106000001 type=event subtype=system pri=debug user=system ui=system action=controller status=success reason=none letype=6 pid=$CONN_ID msg=$MSG

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="Key&Value" arr_length="-1">
    <Field position="0" name="date" />
    <Field position="1" name="msg" convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="2" name="reason" />
    <Field position="3" name="letype" />
    <Field position="4" name="pri" />
    <Field position="5" name="pid" />
    <Field position="6" name="itime" />
    <Field position="7" name="type" />
    <Field position="8" name="ui" />
    <Field position="9" name="subtype" />
    <Field position="10" name="action" />
    <Field position="11" name="logid" />
    <Field position="12" name="time" />
    <Field position="13" name="user" />
    <Field position="14" name="status" />
    <Field position="15" name="model" convert_tag="[[@set('sandbox')]]" />
    <Field position="16" name="logtype" convert_tag="[[@set('system')]]" />
    <Field position="17" name="parser_version" convert_tag="[[@set('v1')]]" />
    <Field position="18" name="original_log" convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="19" name="parser_info" convert_tag="[[@set('[Fortinet]_sandbox_system_v1_keyvalue')]]" />
    <Field position="20" name="eqp_type" convert_tag="[[@set('fw')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
